Colwich 6-max Seat #2 is the button
Seat 2: zepequeno33 ($1.60)

zepequeno33 posts ante $0.01
TestHero posts ante $0.01
zepequeno33 posts the small blind $0.01
TestHero posts the big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Main pot $0.02 | Rake $0.00
Dealt to TestHero [5c 9h]
zepequeno33 raises $0.04 to $0.05
TestHero calls $0.03
*** FLOP *** [Ks 2s Ah]
Main pot $0.12 | Rake $0.00
TestHero checks
zepequeno33 bets $0.04
TestHero calls $0.04
*** TURN *** [Ks 2s Ah] [8s]
Main pot $0.19 | Rake $0.01
TestHero checks
zepequeno33 bets $0.14
TestHero calls $0.14
*** RIVER *** [Ks 2s Ah 8s] [Jd]
Main pot $0.46 | Rake $0.02
TestHero checks
zepequeno33 checks
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Main pot $0.46 | Rake $0.02
zepequeno33 shows [Js 5d] (a pair of Jacks [Js Jd Ah Ks 8s])
TestHero shows [5c 9h] (a high card, Ace high [Ah Ks Jd 9h 8s])
zepequeno33 collected $0.46 from main pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.46 | Rake $0.02
Board [Ks 2s Ah 8s Jd]
